title: Savory Light Papelon Pilaf
description: A light and savory Ukrainian dish featuring papelon (a type of root vegetable) without eggs for a weeknight meal option.

ingredients.name: Papelon
ingredients.notes: Choose firm varieties such as kudla or wiesbaden

instructions: Chop papelon into small pieces and set aside.
In a pan, heat oil or butter over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until softened.
Add papelon to the pan with a pinch of salt and pepper, cook for another minute.
Transfer mixture to an oven-safe dish, add minced garlic and paprika on top.
Bake in preheated oven for 30-45 minutes or until papelon is tender and lightly browned.
Serve hot as a side dish or as the main course with your choice of protein.
